title: trading-trailer
global_style: cinematic 35mm anamorphic lens, deep shadow contrast, cool blue and amber color grading, financial thriller atmosphere, sharp focus on subjects with bokeh backgrounds

scenes.storyboard_prompt: Aerial night shot of a vast financial district skyline, skyscrapers with lit windows reflecting in a dark river below, single helicopter searchlight cutting through fog, establishing the scale and power of the financial world
scenes.video_prompt: slow cinematic drone pull-back revealing the full city skyline, lights twinkling, fog drifting between towers
scenes.camera: aerial drone pull-back, wide anamorphic lens
scenes.motion: slow backward drift revealing the immense scale of the city
scenes.style: deep blue night, amber building lights, cinematic fog

scenes.storyboard_prompt: Extreme close-up of a traders hands flying over a mechanical keyboard, multiple glowing monitors reflected in aviator sunglasses, stock tickers scrolling rapidly in background, high tension energy
scenes.video_prompt: fingers typing rapidly on keyboard, reflections of scrolling market data in the lenses, urgent motion
scenes.camera: tight close-up, rack focus from hands to glasses reflection
scenes.motion: rapid hand movement, urgent typing, market data streaming
scenes.style: cool blue monitor light, sharp focus, high contrast

scenes.storyboard_prompt: A massive illuminated stock chart fills the frame like a mountain range, green and red candles towering like skyscrapers against a dark background, a lone silhouette of a trader stands before it dwarfed by the data
scenes.video_prompt: chart candles rise and fall dramatically, silhouette figure gestures toward the screen, data cascading
scenes.camera: low angle looking up at the chart display, wide lens
scenes.motion: chart bars animating up and down, figure moving purposefully
scenes.style: green and red neon chart glow, dark room, dramatic scale

scenes.storyboard_prompt: A golden bull and a dark bear face off on Wall Street in a dramatic wide shot, stylized like powerful animals frozen in confrontation, NYSE building in background, financial district street scene
scenes.video_prompt: tension between the two figures, subtle movement, wind stirring dust on the empty street
scenes.camera: low wide angle, street level perspective
scenes.motion: animals breathing heavily, subtle shifting weight, ominous stillness
scenes.style: golden amber light on bull, cold shadow on bear, epic wide

scenes.storyboard_prompt: An options chain scrolling on a trading terminal transforms into a chess board, each option contract becomes a chess piece, calls are white knights puts are black rooks, the board is alive with possibility
scenes.video_prompt: screen data morphs and transforms, chess pieces materialize from numbers, strategic arrangement forming
scenes.camera: medium close-up on terminal screen, slight push in
scenes.motion: numbers dissolving into chess pieces, board taking shape
scenes.style: deep blue terminal glow, neon green data, surreal transformation

scenes.storyboard_prompt: Extreme close-up of a traders eye, enormous stock market data reflected in the iris, a storm visible in the reflection with lightning flashing through financial charts, the calm determined eye of someone who has seen everything
scenes.video_prompt: lightning flashes within the eye reflection, data scrolling, the eye remains perfectly still and focused
scenes.camera: macro extreme close-up of a single human eye
scenes.motion: lightning reflections in iris, subtle eye movement, data streaming in reflection
scenes.style: photorealistic macro, electric blue and amber tones, cinematic

scenes.storyboard_prompt: A glowing red sell button on a trading terminal, a hand hovers inches above it with sweat visible on the knuckles, six monitors showing crashing markets in background, the dramatic moment before a critical financial decision
scenes.video_prompt: hand trembling slightly above the button, markets crashing on background screens, dramatic stillness before action
scenes.camera: close-up on hand and button, deep focus on monitors behind
scenes.motion: hand hovering with slight tremor, background screens flashing red
scenes.style: red emergency light, high tension, deep shadow contrast

scenes.storyboard_prompt: A cascade of golden coins and dollar bills raining down in slow motion inside a grand marble trading hall, traders frozen in celebration below, confetti of financial success filling the air with golden light
scenes.video_prompt: currency raining down in slow motion, people reaching up, golden light catching each bill and coin
scenes.camera: high angle looking down into the hall, wide establishing shot
scenes.motion: slow motion currency cascade, arms raised in celebration
scenes.style: golden warm light, marble grandeur, triumphant celebration

scenes.storyboard_prompt: A stock chart line rockets upward like a space launch, the rising line breaks through the ceiling of the frame into a starfield, financial gains transformed into an interstellar trajectory, cinematic metaphor for limitless returns
scenes.video_prompt: chart line accelerating upward with explosive velocity, breaking through frame edge into deep space stars
scenes.camera: vertical pan following the rising chart line upward
scenes.motion: chart line shooting upward with incredible speed, stars appearing at top of frame
scenes.style: electric green chart line, deep space black background, cinematic scale

scenes.storyboard_prompt: Silhouette of a lone trader standing on the rooftop of a glass skyscraper at dawn, the entire city spread below, holding a coffee cup, watching the sunrise that signals the opening bell, master of their financial world
scenes.video_prompt: slow sunrise over the city, golden light spreading across the skyline, figure standing in quiet contemplation
scenes.camera: wide establishing shot at rooftop level, sunrise behind the skyline
scenes.motion: sunrise light slowly spreading, gentle wind movement in clothing
scenes.style: golden hour dawn, silhouette high contrast, epic cinematic resolution
